150:133.notes: Treat the restart of a major Hawaiian eruption at the turn of 1982/1983 as a one-off named-volcano event.

238:7.notes: Treat the Unzendake eruption as a one-off named-volcano event in the short window before the 3 June 1991 dome emergence.

383:27.notes: Treat Talang's April 2005 eruption onset as a one-off named-volcano event over the short post-prediction hazard window.

444:3.notes: Treat Stromboli's late-February 2007 reactivation as a one-off named-volcano event.

464:4.notes: Treat Chaiten's May 2008 reawakening as a one-off named-volcano event in the immediate post-prediction window.
